title: Open Apple Monitor 24 From Monitors Category
goal: Filter the storefront to Monitors, open Apple monitor 24, and stop on the product detail page.
instruction: On the Demoblaze storefront, open the Monitors category, then open the Apple monitor 24 product page and stop when that detail view is visible.
review_notes: First longer Demoblaze retail flow. It requires filtering the listing before selecting the correct product.

steps.explanation: I waited briefly for the storefront product cards to finish loading.
I filtered the storefront to the Monitors category first.
I opened the Apple monitor 24 product detail page from the filtered monitor list.

action.summary: I filtered to Monitors, opened Apple monitor 24, and stopped on the product detail page.

steps.explanation: The requested product page is open now, so I am ending the task.
